validation.amountInvalid: Enter an amount greater than zero.
validation.configJsonInvalid: Config data must be valid JSON.

overview.title: Commerce Control
overview.description: Operational workspace for plan catalog, subscription templates, payment history, wallet adjustments, and withdrawal moderation.
overview.modulesDescription: Use the commerce routes below to move from revenue overview into the exact operational queue you need.
overview.paymentsDescription: Latest payment records across providers with current settlement state.
overview.templatesDescription: Most recent subscription templates currently available to operators.
overview.withdrawalsDescription: Pending payout requests waiting for a staff decision.

routes.plans: Create, tune, and retire monetization plans without leaving the admin app.
routes.subscriptionTemplates: Maintain Remnawave subscription templates and delivery config payloads.
routes.payments: Investigate payment records with provider and status filtering.
routes.wallets: Lookup a user wallet by UUID and apply manual top-ups when operations requires it.
routes.withdrawals: Approve or reject pending withdrawal requests with operator notes.

plans.title: Plan Management
plans.description: Maintain pricing, duration, access limits, and commercial packaging for the plan catalog.
plans.deleteConfirm: Delete this plan from the catalog?

form.featuresPlaceholder:
Priority routing
Regional failover

subscriptionTemplates.title: Subscription Templates
subscriptionTemplates.description: Manage Remnawave template definitions, host bindings, flows, and config payloads used for delivery.

payments.title: Payments Console
payments.description: Inspect payment records, narrow by user UUID, and segment the list by provider or payment status.
payments.empty: No payments matched the current filters.
payments.filtersDescription: Server-side filtering is available by user UUID. Provider, status, and ID search are applied in the client console.
payments.serverFilterHint: Use UUID lookup when you need a payment slice for a specific customer. Secondary filters stay client-side for quick operator pivots.

wallets.title: Wallet Operations
wallets.description: Lookup a user wallet by UUID, inspect current balance state, and credit funds with an operator note.
wallets.lookupDescription: Until the customer directory is built, wallet operations start from an explicit user UUID.
wallets.lookupEmpty: No wallet loaded yet. Enter a user UUID to continue.
wallets.lookupError: Wallet lookup failed. Verify the UUID and try again.
wallets.lookupRequired: Load a wallet before posting a top-up.
wallets.topupDescription: Credit funds into the selected wallet when support or billing operations need a manual correction.

withdrawals.title: Withdrawal Queue
withdrawals.description: Review pending payout requests, add operator notes, and approve or reject the queue safely.
withdrawals.empty: No pending withdrawals are waiting for review.
withdrawals.notePlaceholder: Optional operator note for audit context
